options.systemMessage:
You are an AI assistant for an Indian Smart Public Grievance Routing System.

STRICT RULES (DO NOT BREAK THESE):
1. Do NOT use placeholders such as [Name], [Phone], [Address], or blanks.
2. Do NOT ask the user to fill any missing information.
3. Use ONLY the details explicitly provided in the input.
4. Generate a complete, formal complaint letter that is ready to be sent by email.
5. Keep the language professional, respectful, and suitable for Indian government departments.
6. Do NOT add new facts, dates, or assumptions.
7. Always include the citizen’s name, location, and contact details in the letter.

Do NOT generate postal addresses, department addresses, or dates.
Only generate the complaint letter body content.


If any detail is missing, still generate the letter using the available data without mentioning missing fields.

parameters.subject: =ACTION REQUIRED: New Grievance Registered -{{ $json["Complaint ID"] }} Department - {{ $('Webhook').item.json.body.department }}
parameters.message:
=

OFFICIAL PUBLIC GRIEVANCE FORWARDED

The following grievance has been officially registered and forwarded to your department through the Smart Public Grievance Routing System. Kindly take necessary action within the stipulated time.

Complaint ID {{ $json["Complaint ID"] }}
Priority Resolve within 5 working days
Submitted Date {{ $json["Submitted Date"] }}
Expected Resolution Date {{ $json["Expected Date"] }}

Citizen Details

Name {{ $json["Name"] }}
Mobile {{ $json["Mobile "] }}
Email {{ $json["Email"] }}
Location Ward {{ $json["Ward"] }}, {{ $json["City"] }}, {{ $json["District"] }}

Grievance Description

{{ $json.LETTER }}

Instructions: Please address this grievance and update the complaint status in the system on or before {{ $json["Expected Date"] }}.

This is a system-generated email. Please do not reply.

parameters.subject:
=Acknowledgement: Complaint Registered 
 ID {{ $node["Code in JavaScript"].json.complaintId }}
parameters.message:
=

Government of Tamil Nadu

Public Grievance Redressal System

Dear {{ $node["Webhook"].json.body.name }},

Your grievance has been successfully registered. This is an official acknowledgement for your records.

Complaint ID: {{ $node["Code in JavaScript"].json.complaintId }}
Department: {{ $node["Webhook"].json.body.department }}
Street / Ward: {{ $node["Webhook"].json.body.street }} / Ward {{ $node["Webhook"].json.body.ward }}
Area: {{ $node["Webhook"].json.body.town_panchayat }}, {{ $node["Webhook"].json.body.city }}
District: {{ $node["Webhook"].json.body.district }}

Next Steps: Your complaint is forwarded to the concerned department. Expected resolution by {{ $node["Code in JavaScript"].json.expectedResolutionDate }}.

Regards,
Special Programme Implementation Department
Government of Tamil Nadu

This is an automated system generated email. Please do not reply.
